results.title: Shane van Gisbergen captures the pole for inaugural NASCAR race at Naval Base Coronado
results.description: Shane van Gisbergen captured pole position for the inaugural race on Naval Base Coronado near San Diego, turning a 2-minute, 14.788-second lap around the 16-turn, 3.4-mile street course that easily put him ahead of Carson Hocevar.

results.title: Sandro Tonali transfer state of play after Newcastle reject Tottenham's opening offer
results.description: Newcastle United are braced for further bids for Sandro Tonali but won't budge from their asking price after rejecting Tottenham's opening offer for the midfielder

results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Six players climb FIFA Power Rankings; see who rose in Attacking, Creativity and Defending
results.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 Power Rankings are buzzing with new stars! Jonathan David's hat-trick propelled him up 176 spots in attacking, while Matheus Cunha also surged after a brace. Lucas Paquetá and Vladimir Coufal impressed in creativity, and Neil El Aynaoui and Chris Richards made dramatic climbs in defending, showcasing exceptional performances that are reshaping the tournament's player landscape.

results.title: Shane van Gisbergen wins inaugural Cup pole at San Diego
results.description: Shane van Gisbergen will lead the field to the start of the NASCAR Cup Series’ inaugural running of the Anduril 250 at San Diego’s Naval Base Coronado from pole position, the latter of which he achieved on Saturday, June 20.
